title: Oil prices slide as new attacks in Strait of Hormuz threaten fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire
summary_full: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, retreating from sharp gains in the previous session.
summary_public: Oil prices declined on Tuesday, retreating from sharp gains in the previous session.
